cards.prompt: int? maybe = 12; if (maybe is int number) печатает has value {number}, иначе no value — что напечатает?
cards.code: int? maybe = 12; if (maybe is int number) System.Console.WriteLine($"has value {number}"); else System.Console.WriteLine("no value");

cards.prompt: WaterState(int t) через relational+logical switch; WaterState(100)?
cards.code: string WaterState(int t) => t switch { < 32 => "solid", 32 => "solid/liquid transition", (> 32) and (< 212) => "liquid", 212 => "liquid / gas transition", > 212 => "gas" }; System.Console.WriteLine(WaterState(100));

cards.prompt: Неполный switch (без _) на Name(3) — что печатает try/catch по SwitchExpressionException?
cards.code: string Name(int n) => n switch { 1 => "one", 2 => "two" }; try { System.Console.WriteLine(Name(3)); } catch (System.Runtime.CompilerServices.SwitchExpressionException e) { System.Console.WriteLine($"threw: {e.GetType().Name}"); }
